use_cases: Adds an eye-catching 3D tube cursor effect that follows mouse movement on landing pages
Creates visual interest and engagement on portfolio and creative agency websites
Enhances user experience with smooth animated cursor trails on SaaS dashboards
Provides ambient visual polish without requiring user interaction on modern web apps
Serves as a lightweight attention-grabbing element for marketing and demo pages
ai_summary: A dynamic 3D cursor effect component using Three.js that renders colorful tube-like elements following the mouse pointer. The effect features vibrant gradient colors, dynamic lighting with multiple hues, and smooth animation physics. This overlay component adds visual polish and interactivity to any web page, making it ideal for creative portfolios, SaaS landing pages, and modern web applications seeking an engaging user experience.
